records.m_Talk_ENG: She defeated all those C.O.s with just her bare hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She defeated all those C.O.s with just her bare hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She defeated all those C.O.s with just her bare hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was amazing, Miss Fatima.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was amazing, Miss Fatima.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was amazing, Miss Fatima.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was all thanks to your aerial support, Miss Brecht.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was all thanks to your aerial support, Miss Brecht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was all thanks to your aerial support, Miss Brecht.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But no matter how many C.O.s we defeat, the Corruption ray response hasn't weakened at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But no matter how many C.O.s we defeat, the Corruption ray response hasn't weakened at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But no matter how many C.O.s we defeat, the Corruption ray response hasn't weakened at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that there is something else causing the Corruption ray.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that there is something else causing the Corruption ray.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that there is something else causing the Corruption ray.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are two high-grade Corruption rays coming simultaneously from our 3 and 9 o'clock.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are two high-grade Corruption rays coming simultaneously from our 3 and 9 o'clock.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are two high-grade Corruption rays coming simultaneously from our 3 and 9 o'clock.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Two of them? Won't that be too much for you to handle on your own, Miss Fatima?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Two of them? Won't that be too much for you to handle on your own, Miss Fatima?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Two of them? Won't that be too much for you to handle on your own, Miss Fatima?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If both are Shadows, then it will definitely be a challenge.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If both are Shadows, then it will definitely be a challenge.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If both are Shadows, then it will definitely be a challenge.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chernobog.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chernobog.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chernobog.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take care of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Take care of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Take care of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Category 3 C.O. presumed to be a Shadow 900 m away at 9 o'clock! It's breaking through the dimensional rift and headed this way...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Category 3 C.O. presumed to be a Shadow 900 m away at 9 o'clock! It's breaking through the dimensional rift and headed this way...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Category 3 C.O. presumed to be a Shadow 900 m away at 9 o'clock! It's breaking through the dimensional rift and headed this way...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't see the other one! If we can defeat that one first, then...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't see the other one! If we can defeat that one first, then...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't see the other one! If we can defeat that one first, then...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What am I seeing...? The C.O.s are fighting each other.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What am I seeing...? The C.O.s are fighting each other.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What am I seeing...? The C.O.s are fighting each other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen this before as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen this before as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen this before as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the battle...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the battle...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the battle...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The Human type Shadow that appeared later is cornering the other like it's nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The Human type Shadow that appeared later is cornering the other like it's nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The Human type Shadow that appeared later is cornering the other like it's nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looked to be at least a Category 3, but it was finished off so easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looked to be at least a Category 3, but it was finished off so easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looked to be at least a Category 3, but it was finished off so easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's looking this way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's looking this way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's looking this way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An ordinary Shadow would've already rushed toward us after seeing a Counter. But this one is strangely calm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An ordinary Shadow would've already rushed toward us after seeing a Counter. But this one is strangely calm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An ordinary Shadow would've already rushed toward us after seeing a Counter. But this one is strangely calm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Something else is approaching as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Something else is approaching as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Something else is approaching as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That sound...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That sound...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That sound...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that a helicopter?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that a helicopter?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that a helicopter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chernobog has taken care of the high-tier C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chernobog has taken care of the high-tier C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chernobog has taken care of the high-tier C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Confirmed the survival of the <color=#ffd34c>visitors</color>. Swiftly secure the perimeter. Over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Confirmed the survival of the <color=#ffd34c>visitors</color>. Swiftly secure the perimeter. Over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Confirmed the survival of the <color=#ffd34c>visitors</color>. Swiftly secure the perimeter. Over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the Baba Yaga squad. Are they from the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the Baba Yaga squad. Are they from the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the Baba Yaga squad. Are they from the Northern Union?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That mark...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That mark...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That mark...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the Red Witches.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the Red Witches.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the Red Witches.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They are Felix's personal guards.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They are Felix's personal guards.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They are Felix's personal guards.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Felix...? Why would she be here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Felix...? Why would she be here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Felix...? Why would she be here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think the soldiers are surrounding us. Should we try to make a run for it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think the soldiers are surrounding us. Should we try to make a run for it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think the soldiers are surrounding us. Should we try to make a run for it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They've already blocked off the sky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They've already blocked off the sky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They've already blocked off the sky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With Baba Yaga here, it means that the passage to the Normalside has been blocked.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With Baba Yaga here, it means that the passage to the Normalside has been blocked.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With Baba Yaga here, it means that the passage to the Normalside has been blocked.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...This isn't good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...This isn't good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...This isn't good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They haven't fired any missiles at us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They haven't fired any missiles at us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They haven't fired any missiles at us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It could mean that there is still room to talk.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It could mean that there is still room to talk.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It could mean that there is still room to talk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry for being late.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry for being late.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry for being late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had some other matters to take care of first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had some other matters to take care of first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had some other matters to take care of first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You seem lost. Would you like some help?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You seem lost. Would you like some help?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You seem lost. Would you like some help?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union's Chief of the General Staff, Felix.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union's Chief of the General Staff, Felix.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union's Chief of the General Staff, Felix.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We didn't even send a distress signal, and yet, you found us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We didn't even send a distress signal, and yet, you found us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We didn't even send a distress signal, and yet, you found us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A high-grade Counter is bound to attract Shadows.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A high-grade Counter is bound to attract Shadows.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A high-grade Counter is bound to attract Shadows.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And tracking Shadows is my specialty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And tracking Shadows is my specialty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And tracking Shadows is my specialty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, welcome to the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, welcome to the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, welcome to the Northern Union.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mr. Supreme Administrator.
